goal: 完善 README 安装入口，补充 GitHub Releases 与 install.sh

summary.title: 补齐 README 正式安装入口
summary.what: README.md 扩展 Install 段落，正式写明 install.sh、GitHub Releases、go install 和源码构建四种入口；README.zh.md 增加对应安装段落，并放在 mainline init 初始化说明之前。
summary.why: 开源前 README 会是新用户最常见的落点；安装入口必须直接指向已发布的 GitHub Release 资产、校验文件和脚本安装路径，而不是只给 Go 用户或源码构建用户可用的信息。
summary.user_goal: README 安装入口不完整；开新分支补充 GitHub Releases / install.sh，并直接提 PR。

decisions.chose: 英文和中文 README 都记录 install.sh、GitHub Releases、go install、源码构建。
decisions.rationale: 这覆盖了明天开源后最常见的入口：直接脚本安装、下载预编译二进制、Go 用户安装和贡献者本地构建。

decisions.chose: 文档说明 install.sh 会拉取最新 GitHub Release、校验 checksums.txt、安装到可写 PATH 目录，并支持 MAINLINE_VERSION / MAINLINE_INSTALL_DIR 覆盖。
decisions.rationale: 这些行为与现有 install.sh 保持一致，减少用户复制命令后才发现安装目录或版本选择规则的摩擦。

decisions.point: 中文 README 阅读顺序
decisions.chose: 把中文安装段落放在 `mainline init` 初始化说明之前。
decisions.rationale: 中文 README 原先会让读者先看到 init 命令；开源落地页应先回答如何获得 mainline 二进制。

rejected.alternative: 只补英文 README 的 Install 段落
rejected.reason: 中文 README 已经是独立入口，缺少安装段落会让中文读者直接卡在 `mainline init`。

rejected.alternative: 提前写 Homebrew 或其他包管理器安装说明
rejected.reason: 这些分发渠道还没有正式接入；当前文档只写已经存在并验证过的 release / script / Go / source 路径。

acknowledged_constraints.note: This change does not modify eval scoring or live agent output evaluation language.
Webhook secret examples were not touched.
Webhook signature documentation was not touched.
The README documents the existing release archive naming and checksums.txt contract without changing workflow or install.sh behavior.
The README opening positioning was not changed.
This change does not touch worktree-clean checks or filename allowlists.
No spinner, stdout, or JSON-output behavior changed.
This change does not modify substring matching or judge-scoring behavior.
Eval result claims were not changed.
The init section still says init installs skill and hooks; it does not claim init writes AGENTS.md by default.

review_notes: Docs-only change. `git diff --check` passed, and `gh release view` confirmed the current v0.4.0 release includes checksums.txt plus darwin/linux/windows assets matching the documented naming pattern. No local Go test suite was run.

behavioral_changes: README.md Install section now presents install.sh, GitHub Releases, go install, and source build as official installation paths.
README.zh.md now has a matching installation section before the mainline init setup flow.
Installation docs now describe the release asset naming pattern and checksums.txt verification surface.
security_implications: Installation docs direct users toward checksum-backed GitHub Release artifacts and note that install.sh verifies checksums.txt before installing.
